case_title: GIVI INADZE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INADZE, GIVI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $40(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INADZE, GIVI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GRACE M GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INADZE, GIVI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY INADZE, GIVI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY INADZE, GIVI CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF GIVI INADZE IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER LILY INADZE (SISTER OF PLAINTIFF) WHO WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN (CLAIMS ADJUSTER). COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATIANA IACONA #301252 VIA PHONE WAS ONLY ABLE TO ASSIST WITH INTERPREATION UNTIL 10:30 A.M. AND NOT FOR THE HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
